OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Mohammed Siraj bowling to Priyansh Arya, Through the Line for a maximum! good length ball with a bit of width on offer, Arya swings this through the line and over cover, he goes for a mighty maximum! Great extension of arms from Arya!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Kagiso Rabada to Priyansh Arya - DOT BALL !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: Kagiso Rabada bowling to Priyansh Arya, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Priyansh Arya plays a forward defensive shot and is beaten

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Kagiso Rabada to Priyansh Arya Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Kagiso Rabada bowling to Priyansh Arya, short length ball, pitching on leg stump, Priyansh Arya plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot WICKET Priyansh Arya c Ashok Sharma b Kagiso Rabada (Punjab Kings 7 Runs for 1 wickets) towards Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Kagiso Rabada bowling to Priyansh Arya, Rabada draw first blood for GT! banged in short, gets high on Priyansh who looks to go for a pull shot, he gets a top-edge that goes high in the air, Ashok Sharma at short mid-wicket stays under the ball and completes his maiden catch of the tournament! Excellent execution from the champion bowler! Both the teams that were consistent with the opening partnership last season lost their first wicket sooner in this game! 

WICKET Priyansh Arya c Ashok Sharma b Kagiso Rabada (Punjab Kings 7 Runs for 1 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Prasidh Krishna to Shreyas Iyer Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Prasidh Krishna bowling to Shreyas Iyer, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Shreyas Iyer plays an aggressive front foot flick WICKET Shreyas Iyer c Washington Sundar b Prasidh Krishna (Punjab Kings 110 Runs for 3 wickets) towards Deep Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Prasidh Krishna bowling to Shreyas Iyer, Prasidh Strikes in his first ball! With very little to defend, was Prasidh introduced a little late in the game? good length ball on the leg stump, inviting Shreyas to go for a big shot, he went for a flick with the angle but does not bother to keep that down, hits it straight on the throat of Washington Sundar at mid-wicket, he does not miss out on those! Prasidh continues from where he left off last season! 

WICKET Shreyas Iyer c Washington Sundar b Prasidh Krishna (Punjab Kings 110 Runs for 3 wickets)towards Deep Mid-Wicket

Washington Sundar bowling to Nehal Wadhera, Wickets tumble here for PBKS quickly! Game on at New Chandigarh! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Nehal Wadhera comes down the pitch and flat bats the drive straight to Gill at cover, the Skipper takes a good low catch! GT is still fighting big! Is there a twist in the tale? 

WICKET Nehal Wadhera c Shubman Gill b Washington Sundar (Punjab Kings 113 Runs for 4 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Prasidh Krishna to Shashank Singh Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Prasidh Krishna bowling to Shashank Singh, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Shashank Singh glides it WICKET Shashank Singh c Jos Buttler b Prasidh Krishna (Punjab Kings 118 Runs for 5 wickets) towards Wicket Keeper
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Prasidh Krishna bowling to Shashank Singh, GT keep fighting and fighting! short of good length ball, on the channel, Shashank Singh tried to guide this using Prasidh's pace but was caught on the crease due to the extra bounce on the surface. All Singh could manage was an edge as the ball carried to the keeper, Buttler takes the regulation catch behind. PBKS are five down now with 45 more to get! 

WICKET Shashank Singh c Jos Buttler b Prasidh Krishna (Punjab Kings 118 Runs for 5 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Prasidh Krishna to Marcus Stoinis Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Prasidh Krishna bowling to Marcus Stoinis, short length ball, pitching outside off stump, Marcus Stoinis plays an upper cut WICKET Marcus Stoinis c Rashid Khan b Prasidh Krishna (Punjab Kings 118 Runs for 6 wickets) towards Deep Third Man
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Prasidh Krishna bowling to Marcus Stoinis, Prasidh continues his purple run as GT find ways to sneak in! short length ball outside off-stump, Stoinis waits on it and executes an upper-cut just to find the safe hands of Tewatia at third man! What's happening here? Prasidh is wreaking havoc on the PBKS batters, 3 wickets inside two overs for him! PBKS slide further and further as Stoinis goes for a second-ball duck! 

WICKET Marcus Stoinis c Rahul Tewatia b Prasidh Krishna (Punjab Kings 118 Runs for 6 wickets)

OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Kagiso Rabada bowling to Cooper Connolly, Wickets keep tumbling at one end but connolly is sensational with a bat on his debut! He likes pace in the ball and just nailing it! What a way to announce your arrival in the league!

Washington Sundar bowling to Cooper Connolly, PBKS won by three wickets! All four games have been won by home teams so far! Good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Cooper Connolly creams this through the cover for a boundary! Connolly u beauty, a debut to remember for the youngster! When the going gets tougher and tougher, he stepped in and nailed things to get Punjab over the line! 

The debutant seals it in style! ????@PunjabKingsIPL clinch a thriller in New Chandigarh to get their campaign going with a win ??

Scorecard ?? https://t.co/75rCxTCOL1#TATAIPL | #KhelBindaas | #PBKSvGT pic.twitter.com/WqBQNjuvA1
